testsuite.name: analizator.ExposedAnalysisRepositoryTest
testsuite.system-out: 22:40:33.002 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS PROTEINS 22:40:33.003 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ORFS 22:40:33.004 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS SEQUENCES 22:40:33.005 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS EXPERIMENTS 22:40:33.012 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS EXPERIMENTS (ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME VARCHAR(255) NULL, STATUS VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, CREATED_AT_EPOCH_MS BIGINT NOT NULL) 22:40:33.017 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS SEQUENCES (ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, EXPERIMENT_ID INT NOT NULL, HEADER VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, RAW_SEQUENCE TEXT NOT NULL, NORMALIZED_SEQUENCE TEXT NOT NULL, "length" INT NOT NULL, GC_CONTENT DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_SEQUENCES_EXPERIMENT_ID__ID FOREIGN KEY (EXPERIMENT_ID) REFERENCES EXPERIMENTS(ID) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT) 22:40:33.022 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ORFS (ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, SEQUENCE_ID INT NOT NULL, FRAME INT NOT NULL, START_POS INT NOT NULL, END_POS INT NOT NULL, "length" INT NOT NULL, "sequence" TEXT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_ORFS_SEQUENCE_ID__ID FOREIGN KEY (SEQUENCE_ID) REFERENCES SEQUENCES(ID) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT) 22:40:33.028 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS PROTEINS (ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ORF_ID INT NOT NULL, AMINO_ACID_SEQUENCE TEXT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_PROTEINS_ORF_ID__ID FOREIGN KEY (ORF_ID) REFERENCES ORFS(ID) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT) 22:40:33.033 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO EXPERIMENTS (ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, STATUS, CREATED_AT_EPOCH_MS) VALUES ('sample.fasta', 'COMPLETED', 1778096433030) 22:40:33.036 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO SEQUENCES (EXPERIMENT_ID, HEADER, RAW_SEQUENCE, NORMALIZED_SEQUENCE, "length", GC_CONTENT) VALUES (1, 'seq_orf_demo', 'ATGAAATAGCCCATGCCCTAAATGTTTTGA', 'ATGAAATAGCCCATGCCCTAAATGTTTTGA', 30, 36.67) 22:40:33.039 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO ORFS (SEQUENCE_ID, FRAME, START_POS, END_POS, "length", "sequence") VALUES (1, 0, 1, 9, 9, FRAME, START_POS, END_POS, "length", "sequence") VALUES (1, 0, 13, 21, 9, 'ATGCCCTAA') 22:40:33.045 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO PROTEINS (ORF_ID, AMINO_ACID_SEQUENCE) VALUES (2, 'MP') 22:40:33.048 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO ORFS (SEQUENCE_ID, FRAME, START_POS, END_POS, "length", "sequence") VALUES (1, 0, 22, 30, 9, 'ATGTTTTGA') 22:40:33.050 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- INSERT INTO PROTEINS (ORF_ID, AMINO_ACID_SEQUENCE) VALUES (3, 'MF') 22:40:33.054 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- SELECT SEQUENCES.ID, SEQUENCES.EXPERIMENT_ID, SEQUENCES.HEADER, SEQUENCES.RAW_SEQUENCE, SEQUENCES.NORMALIZED_SEQUENCE, SEQUENCES."length", SEQUENCES.GC_CONTENT FROM SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCES.EXPERIMENT_ID = 1 22:40:33.058 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- SELECT ORFS.ID, ORFS.SEQUENCE_ID, ORFS.FRAME, ORFS.START_POS, ORFS.END_POS, ORFS."length", ORFS."sequence" FROM ORFS WHERE ORFS.SEQUENCE_ID = 1 ORDER BY ORFS.FRAME ASC, ORFS.START_POS ASC 22:40:33.062 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- SELECT PROTEINS.ID, PROTEINS.ORF_ID, PROTEINS.AMINO_ACID_SEQUENCE FROM PROTEINS WHERE PROTEINS.ORF_ID = 1 22:40:33.063 [Test worker] DEBUG Exposed -- SELECT PROTEINS.ID,
